# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Transform: AWS::CloudFormation::Transform
Parameters:
  KeyPairName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
  ApplicationName:
    Type: String
    Default: myapp
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
  DatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: myappdb
  DatabaseUser:
    Type: String
    Default: admin
  DatabasePassword:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-public-subnet-1"

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-public-subnet-2"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-igw"

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-public-route-table"

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: AttachGateway
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-0c55b159cbfafe1d0
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyPairName
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-ec2-instance"

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instance
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-instance-sg"

  LoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-lb"
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref LoadBalancerSecurityGroup
      Type: application

  LoadBalancerSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Load Balancer
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-lb-sg"

  TargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-target-group"
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  Listener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: forward
          TargetGroupArn: !Ref TargetGroup
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref LoadBalancer
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP

  Database:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-db"
      DBName: !Ref DatabaseName
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.micro
      Engine: mysql
      MasterUsername: !Ref DatabaseUser
      MasterUserPassword: !Ref DatabasePassword
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref DatabaseSecurityGroup
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for RDS
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-db-subnet-group"

  DatabaseSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for RDS
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-db-sg"

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-vpc-id"

  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-public-subnet-1-id"

  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-public-subnet-2-id"

  LoadBalancerDNS:
    Description: Load Balancer DNS Name
    Value: !GetAtt LoadBalancer.DNSName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-lb-dns"

  DatabaseEndpoint:
    Description: Database Endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt Database.Endpoint.Address
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-db-endpoint"

  S3BucketName:
    Description: S3 Bucket Name
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-bucket-name"
